recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Fantasy, Adventure, Action, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Agent Coulson stops at a convenience store and deals with a coincidental robbery during his visit.

recommendations.title: Alien Hunter
recommendations.overview: Government agents find evidence of extraterrestrial life at the South Pole.

recommendations.title: Monsters 103 Mercies Dragon Damnation
recommendations.overview: A samurai's path leads him to a young waitress whose hometown was destroyed by a dragon. He doesn't want any trouble — but it finds them anyway.

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: White Heaven in Hell
recommendations.overview: With most of his family already dead at Ogami Itto's hands, Retsudo launches one final plot to destroy him, and when that fails, unleashes the fury of every remaining member of the Yagyu clan.

recommendations.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
recommendations.overview: When his love interest doesn't show up for a meeting, a man and his friends go to Goa in order to find her, where they discover she loves someone else.

recommendations.title: A Wrinkle in Time
recommendations.overview: After the disappearance of her scientist father, three peculiar beings send Meg, her brother, and her friend to space in order to find him.
